'''ât-s-b-k''' ('''katasbekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunomodulate|immunomodulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunomodulate|immunomodulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-s-b-k
|-
! Lemma
| katasbekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitasbekoko|thitasbekoko]] || [[word:jitasbekoko|jitasbekoko]] || [[word:shitasbekoko|shitasbekoko]] || [[word:kitasbekoko|kitasbekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
